properties.Observation: Existing Earthen canal, some places Constructed of rectangular concrete lining(600mm x 450mm)   Water from this canal is used to grow  Vegetable and paddy on an area of about 30 acres.
properties.Description:
Improvements to Welikada Ela

Canal reservation protection by concrete lining  For  100mm thick , 0.3m  wide  and 0.3m high canal -double banking

Stream / canal  reservation protection by earthfilling of  strip   of 1.5m to 2m wide  and average Depth of

properties.Observation: During the rainy season when too much water flows, Bank erosion occurs
properties.Description:
Improvements to Welikada Ela, Weli Ela

Planting Bamboo species and Vetiver grass or Riparian species

Vegetative cover improving around structures (5m x 10m) with planting Arecanut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, and planting Kumbuk/ Mee/ Godapara/ Kaduru
